channel.title: Melgoza on Puffin Foundation Resources
channel.description: Recent content in Melgoza on Puffin Foundation Resources

item.title: America Asks: Is Damon Darling Really Rich? Our Investigation Exposes The Facts.
item.description: However, this is america, the nation where entertainment has now become more important than justice, so why are we shocked, or even surprised?

item.title: America Divided: The Unsettling Legacy Of Paula Baniszewski.
item.description: 1.美国正式的全称 the united states of america 2.拆分 ：united联合的+states州（美国有50个州1个特区）+america美洲=美利坚合众国，美国是 联邦制 可以从国家名字看出.
